reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine whether Eric Bloom and Otep Shamaya are each described with a lyric-writing or songwriting role.
2. Compare the role descriptions and return which artist is a lyricist.
original_final_question: Which artist is a lyricist, Eric Bloom or Otep Shamaya? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Compare the supported evidence: Node 1: Eric Bloom: Eric Bloom (born December 1, 1944) is an American singer, songwriter and musician.; Node 2: Otep Shamaya: Otep Shamaya is the lead vocalist of the nu metal band Otep.. Final answer: Eric Bloom
